title: Linköping Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Linköping with a Z-Score of -4.57. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Linköping are extremely cold, with a significant impact on the city's infrastructure. 
 The low temperatures have resulted in a high number of heating degree days (HDD), with a value of 17.0 GG, while the cooling degree days (CDD) remain at 0.0 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 56%, with a moderate wind speed of 6.5 km/h, exacerbating the cold conditions.
conclusion: Immediate action is required to mitigate the effects of this critical cold snap in Linköping.
